props.name: color
props.description: Stroke/glow color. Any CSS color (hex, rgb, hsl).

props.name: chaos
props.description: Distortion intensity (0 = no distortion, higher = more chaotic).

props.name: borderRadius
props.description: Border radius in pixels for the electric border path.

props.name: className
props.description: Optional className applied to the root wrapper.

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the bordered container.
